character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: Treats wounded men, consults with the squire, and prepares to seek Ben Gunn.

character_dossiers.name: the captain
character_dossiers.biography: Suffering grievous wounds but not fatal, recovering under care.

character_dossiers.name: Squire
character_dossiers.biography: Helps cook and consults with the doctor and captain.

character_dossiers.name: Hunter
character_dossiers.biography: A pirate who died after being shot and sustaining severe injuries.

character_dossiers.name: Captain Smollett
character_dossiers.biography: Injured in the action, surviving with non-fatal wounds.

character_dossiers.name: Gray
character_dossiers.biography: Sits with the narrator, expresses envy of the doctor's situation.

character_dossiers.name: Ben Gunn
character_dossiers.biography: A figure the doctor intends to seek for information about a hidden boat.

character_dossiers.name: Job
character_dossiers.biography: The shooter who wounded the captain.
